programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: After discovering contestants on Swellview's Got Talent are losing consciousness, Captain Man and Kid Danger enlist the help of Charlotte and Schwoz in order to find out what is causing the mischief.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Whaaaat?!? Captain Man and Kid Danger are each stuck in a hole?!? Charlotte and Jasper better go help, 'cuz Schwoz is takin' a bean bath!

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: When their secret identities gets out, Danger Force will stop at nothing to prevent their parents from finding out who is behind their masks.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly and Sam show interest in the same boy, they vow to not let him come between them. This turns out to be more difficult than they imagined and soon their friendship is tested as they compete for his attention.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly needs to intervene when Spencer becomes addicted to playing a video game. Sam tricks Freddie into believing that he’s being plagued by bad luck when he refuses to forward a 'chain email'.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat's babysitting skills are tested when they look after a young boy, Oscar, who is very prone to accidents. The girls are determined to showing Oscar a fun time while struggling to keep him out of harm's way.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The mutant seahorse called MUSTANG SALLY is going to flood the city... and the only thing standing in his way are LEO and Pigeon Pete. Being the leader isn't all it's cracked up to be.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The East River 3 are on the verge of victory! The Turtles and Mutanimals must team up to stop them, but not everything is as it seems... what is the PEARL and why does Goldfin want it?

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his precious alarm clock, but nothing else is loud enough to wake him up on time. // Karen quickly learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick discovers that the rock he lives under is actually a sea turtle who overslept. // Old Man Jenkins disrupts business as usual at the Krusty Krab, but Mr. Krabs can't find a way to kick him out.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Stan claims to have a real Marsupilami appearing in a show he's putting on, but it's a fake robot. // Acu thinks a fish-loving alien is in town, and Mica offers to help him track it down.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best ruins Bester's painting by accident so in order to avoid hurting her feelings he blames an innocent chicken. // Having lost their soccer ball over the garden fence, the twins have no option but to find a way to get it back.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Bester's record attempt is at risk when Best steals her thunder by being the robot instead of learning the robot. // On a search for the first woodpecker in spring, Best finds that he's in very much in tune with nature after all.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: The Star family's pet toilet Tinkle has eleven toilet puppies. // Mistaking it for the local park, the Star family splits up at a cemetery to enjoy their favorite picnic activities.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: The tiny futuristic city of Shmandor exacts revenge on Patrick Star. // Patrick and Squidina go on location to interview their neighbors.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: The Ice Cream Man and Ice Cream King team up to capture a mysterious ice cream eating beast.

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: Sonic finds himself in a strange jungle world with even stranger tree-dwelling versions of his friends, whom he must protect from a "monster" below. Sonic soon learns not everything is as it seems in the depths of the mysterious Boscage Maze!

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Cherry visits, and the Thundermans discover she still has her superpowers. Cherry promises to remove them after her girls' day with Phoebe and Chloe, but the powers malfunction and puts the group in danger. Max hosts Jinx, making Colosso jealous.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: When Chapa's beloved long lost cell phone returns to the Man's Nest under mysterious circumstances, her hunt for the truth threatens to destroy Danger Force.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Piper's school Parrot, Otto, starts to repeat "Henry is Kid Danger". Henry and Jasper have to stall until Ray, Charlotte, and Schwoz can find a way to fix things.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the 'perfect' family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. // Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln purchases a kiddie pool, and things get out of hand when all 10 of his sisters want to use it. // After noticing that none of his sisters share his interests, Lincoln attempts to mold Lily into his mini-me.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Afraid of failing her PE exam again, Lucy recruits the Morticians Club to help her pass.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Lady Upturn introduces Squidward, and his musical "talents", to her high society friends after she becomes his patron. // Squidward sets out to prove that aliens aren't real...until he has a close encounter of his own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob experiences a bad luck streak when his lucky tie clip suddenly goes missing. // When Patrick can't fall asleep, he seeks assistance from the Sandman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward gleefully switches jobs with a bus driver for an easy ride... until SpongeBob and Patrick climb aboard.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: In this ad-packed variety episode, The Patrick Show sells merchandise in order to fund its second season. // Patrick forces his entire family to participate in a series of different game show challenges.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: The Star family takes over the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lori becomes a celebrity at school when she hits a hole-in-one on a notoriously difficult course. // The cheerleaders challenge Lynn and her teammates to a 'cheer off' when Lynn dismisses them as athletes.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Annoyed by Leni's intrusive babysitting, Lisa accidentally blasts herself and Todd into space. // Lola tries to whip Mom into tip-top pageant condition for a Mother-Daughter pageant.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When the kids discover Myrtle has a shady past, they try to expose her before Pop Pop proposes. // Lynn and Liam butt heads when they're forced to partner up as the middle school hall monitors.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lori struggles to make a good impression on Bobby's dad after accidentally pushing him into a puddle. // Desperate to have the best show-and-tell in class, Lily takes Lisa's shrink ray to school.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: When Halmoni chooses Jack over Lil to be her Trot dance competition partner, jealous Lil seeks revenge. / Min asks Jack to run a simple errand, but Charlie the gibbon intervenes, sending Jack and Lil chasing after him into the town's abandoned mines.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob embarks on an epic journey to have his beloved spatula reforged by the legendary Guru Greasetrap.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton's giant Chum Bucket glove runs wild in town, but SpongeBob has a handy friend to help them out. // SpongeBob takes his first break ever at work, but how will he spend his precious time?

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob discovers a crazed castaway living in his walls.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Rosa installs security cameras at the park, and people hate being spied on. // When the Twins take the Marsupilamis to school, Stan spots Twister and claims a poisonous frog is loose to gain access.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln gets a tutor that all his sisters instantly get crushes on, making it impossible for Lincoln to study. // The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. // When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lana brings home a skunk to rehabilitate, Lola grows attached when she finds the skunk has finer tastes.

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: Sonic is shocked that the Boscage Maze "Monster" is Amy AKA Thorn Rose. Wielding a Paradox Prism shard, Thorn wages war on the tree-dwelling Scavengers. Sonic must save these savage Shatter-Friends from each other to find a way home.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: The gang thinks they have found the perfect tunnels to access all of Swellview, until they are confronted by the tunnels' original inhabitants.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: A 'Messing With Lewbert' sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly’s obnoxious doorman. The gang nurses him back to health until Freddie’s mother steps in and takes over. When a romance starts to blossom they have to stop it.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Tori discovers that her friends have been secretly going to a fancy restaurant instead of playing in an annual ping pong tournament.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: After Marky discovers Lay Lay's secret, he takes advantage by having her use her powers to do what he says. But when an overworked Lay Lay starts glitching, Marky and Sadie must fix her before the girls have to perform at an awards show.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lynn pushes Liam to his limits when he becomes the star pitcher for the middle school baseball team. // Lincoln's friends try to stop him from performing a magic act at the middle school talent show.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln is tired of his sisters meddling in his business until he's being picked on at school. // Lincoln secretly videos his sister's most embarrassing moments in order to win a video contest at school.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: When Lily starts digging to find out why her favorite ice cream truck is selling shaved ice, she uncovers a town-wide conspiracy. // Dirk is wrongfully accused of stealing a Canyon Valley landmark so Min comes out of lawyer retirement to help him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob finds a nasty sea urchin living in the Krusty Krab, and tries everything to force it out. // After getting his groceries stolen, Squidward convinces SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick discover that their favorite Kelpbed Kid is a familiar face. // It's invasion of the faux-chovies when everyone in Bikini Bottom suddenly starts meeping!

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lynn and friends enjoy free perks around Royal Woods when their team gets sponsored by local businesses.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After failing to make Chef Guy Grazer a meal on his show, the kids try to erase the footage before it airs. // The kids search all over Royal Woods to find the missing furniture they left outside while cleaning.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luan thinks Mr. Coconuts is out for revenge when she replaces him with Lola in her act. // Hoping to drive out to the outlets to meet Lori, Leni ooks for alternative ways to get her driver's license.
